allow: Bash(node -e "try { require\(''''./index.js''''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''''PARSE ERROR:'''', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const pty = require\(''node-pty''\); console.log\(''loaded ok''\); const p = pty.spawn\(''/bin/zsh'', [], { name: ''xterm-256color'', cols: 80, rows: 24, cwd: process.env.HOME, env: process.env }\); p.onData\(d => { console.log\(''output:'', d.slice\(0,20\)\); p.kill\(\); }\); setTimeout\(\(\) => { p.kill\(\); process.exit\(0\); }, 3000\);")

Bash(node -e "const pty = require\(''node-pty''\); const p = pty.spawn\(''/bin/zsh'', [], { name: ''xterm-256color'', cols: 80, rows: 24, cwd: process.env.HOME, env: process.env }\); p.onData\(d => { console.log\(''ok''\); p.kill\(\); process.exit\(0\); }\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(1\), 3000\);")
